summary: Completed testing of System Audit Report bug fix for inventory differences (Diferencias de Inventario - faltantes). All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed all movement types appear correctly in the Auditoría General del Sistema report with proper labels and ingredient names.
seed_data_creation: Used existing data in date range 2026-02-25 to 2026-02-28
context_for_next_testing_agent: System audit report fix verified. Key findings: 1) GET /api/reports/system-audit now returns ALL movement types (sale, purchase, adjustment, difference, production_output, production_consume, waste, transfer_in, transfer_out), 2) ACEITE faltante entries appear with correct ingredient_name (not '?'), 3) Event type filter works correctly, 4) Spanish labels are correct: 'Venta (Descuento de Inventario)', 'Compra (Entrada de Inventario)', 'Producción (Salida)', 'Producción (Consumo)', 'Diferencia de Inventario', 5) stock_difference_logs uses 'timestamp' field for date filtering and shows as 'Diferencia Inventario (Detalle)'

backend_api.ACEITE faltante appears in system audit: PASS - Both types of entries visible
backend_api.ingredient_name populated (not '?'): PASS - All difference entries have proper ingredient names
backend_api.event_type filter works: PASS - Filtering by type returns correct subset

frontend_ui.Event type summary badges display: PASS - All types shown with counts
frontend_ui.Table shows all entry types: PASS - Includes timestamps, types, descriptions, users, values
frontend_ui.ACEITE entries visible: PASS - Both 'Diferencia de Inventario' and 'Diferencia Inventario (Detalle)'
frontend_ui.Monetary values shown: PASS - RD$ 778.94 for ACEITE faltante detail entry

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Stock adjustments (Diferencias de Inventario - faltantes) were not showing in system reports
root_causes_fixed: 1) System audit was filtering only specific movement types - NOW includes ALL types
2) ingredient_name was missing from stock_movements for differences - NOW populated
3) stock_difference_logs was using 'created_at' but backend saves as 'timestamp' - NOW uses correct field
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: PASS - All inventory movements now appear correctly in system audit report

aceite_entries: ACEITE: faltante (128.0oz) - Vencimiento (Diferencia Inventario Detalle) - RD$ 778.94
